title: Department’s 24/7 Emergency Response and Action Center Unit. The
content: 38 Department shall maintain a centralized system that facilitates, assists, monitors and 39 documents the repatriation of seafarers in distress, regardless of employment status, in 40 coordination with relevant government agencies, the private sector, and other 41 stakeholders. 42 43
